description:
Description:
  As a logged-in user,
  I want to add a new address
  using Data Table

steps.name: Given the user is on the TutorialNinja website
When the user clicks the My Account button
And the user clicks the Login link
And the user enters email "jeeva11@gmail.com" and password "1234"
And the user clicks the Login button
Then the user should see the my account text
